zotero.abstractNote: Generative models for 3D medical images are essential for data augmentation and privacy-preserving data sharing. However, generating high-resolution 3D volumes remains computationally challenging. In this work, we propose the Multiscale Metamorphic Variational Autoencoder (MM-VAE), a generative model that synthesizes 3D brain MRI volumes by learning a multiscale representation of the data. Our model decomposes the image generation process into a sequence of metamorphic transformations, allowing for the synthesis of high-fidelity 3D volumes at multiple scales. We demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on 3D brain MRI synthesis, producing images with high anatomical fidelity and diversity.
